title: Contact - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP
meta_description: Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire
text_excerpt: Contact - Jonathan Davies MP - Jonathan Davies MP Skip to main content Jonathan Davies MP Serving the people of Mid Derbyshire Join Get Involved Donate Home Contact In parliament In the constituency Newsletter Testimonials Frequently Asked Questions Youth Survey Report More Menu Contact Contact details Telephone number: 01332 415616 Email: jonathan.davies.mp@parliament.uk Address for letters: House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Appointments Recent security advice asks that meetings with MPs and the casework team will be appointment only. You can get in touch using the contact details to book a convenient time. Please note, due to strict Parliamentary protocol MPs can only take on cases for residents living in their constituency. Contact form Please contact me if you would like to talk to me about any concerns.
